paperTitle: VLA-Cache: Efficient Vision-Language-Action Manipulation via Adaptive Token Caching

benchmarks.label: LIBERO
benchmarks.detail: Suites: libero spatial 83.8 · libero object 85.8 · libero goal 76.4 · libero 10 52.8 | Table 2 | Notes: All 4 standard suites reported. Standard 50 demos/task setup.

benchmarks.detail: Suites: google robot vm 81.9 · google robot va 67.8 | Tasks: pick coke can vm 92 · move near vm 83.3 · open close drawer vm 70.5 · place apple in drawer vm 51.6 · pick coke can va 91.7 · move near va 79.3 · open close drawer va 32.5 · place apple in drawer va 45.8 | Table 3 | Notes: Reports standard Google Robot tasks for VM and VA settings.
